subcodes.first_line: Muhammad-Javad had a brother in Istanbul who was supplicating and entreating God to become rich.
subcodes.first_line_orig: محمد جواد برادری داشت که در اسلامبول تضرع و زاری میکرد که غنی بشود
subcodes.subjects: @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @business; financial; property matters
